summary: Comprehensive testing completed for TokenLens MVP - AI API cost intelligence dashboard. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend components rendering properly, and user flows functional.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoints (/api/, /api/health) return 200
Authentication system working with session tokens
Dashboard stats API returns mock data correctly
Cost by feature API returns 5 features with cost data
Daily spend API returns 30 days of data
Top users API returns 5 user records
Recent API calls returns 8 call records
API keys endpoint returns user's API key
API key regeneration working
Alert configurations API returns 3 default configs
Alert history API returns mock history data
Alert config creation/update working
Unauthenticated access properly returns 401
Login page loads with Sign In button
Dashboard page loads with authenticated session
All 4 dashboard stat cards display correctly
Cost by Feature bar chart renders
Daily Spend line chart renders
Top Users table displays data
Recent API Calls table displays data
Navigation between pages works (Dashboard, API Keys, Alerts)
API Keys page shows code snippets with Python/Node.js tabs
Alerts page shows 3 alert configuration cards
Alert History table displays mock data
